# Appendix 

To add your Galaxy data to the appendix of your report, you can share the entire history with us. 

First, click the three horizontal lines in the top right corner. 

Next, click "Share and manage access":

Finally, click the "Make history accessible" button. After a few minutes, a url link will appear. **Copy and paste this link into your appendix** 

![GIF of making history accessible link](GIFs/MakeHistoryAccessible.gif)
